concerns.text: The implementation plan does not include any task or phase that addresses Functional Requirement FR‑032 (subgroup prevalence analysis by domain and year). FR‑032 is listed as mandatory in the specification and is referenced in the research document, but there is no corresponding step, module, or output described in the plan (e.g., no mention of generating a subgroup report or performing Fisher’s exact test). This omission creates a mismatch between the plan and the spec/data‑model, violating the requirement that every FR appear in at least one plan phase.
